data.name: THE SHRiNK Season One
data.detailed_description: In THE SHRiNK you play as a 23-year-old who lacks motivation. He lives in a house full of women in a small town called Woodsville. Life was always somewhat quiet and uneventful there... that is until today. An outbreak is about to hit your hometown. Coincidentally today is also your birthday and you have decided it's time to make some changes in your life but the effects of this virus are set to change your life in ways you could never imagine.
data.about_the_game: In THE SHRiNK you play as a 23-year-old who lacks motivation. He lives in a house full of women in a small town called Woodsville. Life was always somewhat quiet and uneventful there... that is until today. An outbreak is about to hit your hometown. Coincidentally today is also your birthday and you have decided it's time to make some changes in your life but the effects of this virus are set to change your life in ways you could never imagine.
data.short_description: THE SHRiNK is an AVN. You play as Alex (default name) you can choose your name, and the names of the rest of the main cast. You can also choose your relationship with them from the very start of the game. Choices in this game will decide the type of content you see or miss out on.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Optional

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Optional
